name: FRESH IDEA MANAGEMENT @ MOUNT MARTY UNIVERSITY-BENNYS CAFE

violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Build up of grease and debris found on the side of the fryers during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters for the hood ventilation system were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Flooring under fryers was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
